reviews.review_description:
Absolute cinema I'd join a discord server for this game if I could all i ask is how do you eat the food? And maby add more books to help new players understand how to play i helped these three people out and we all didn't know how to eat


Good game ive played it for 2 days now

The game is broken. Plain and simple. Crafting just doesn't work sometimes. Collecting items is a hassle. Breaking trees THE FIRST THING. Is difficult (you need to climb on the tree to break it for some reason) BUT. The game has potential. And could be a very fun experience with the right adjustments. Like an inventory to make collection simpler, crafting actually working, and recipes being right. (Sometimes the recipes just craft the wrong thing. Like making a sword makes a wall.) The game is very new so most complaints are probably going to be fixed but at the moment I wouldn't really like to play this alot.

There is need to be a lobby, private lobby, codes, gun.

Map update= wild fire, map generation, ships, swimming, and cars or any some kind of vehicle.

And all of that has to be in the game:) And I know how to chop down trees so go in the game and I will show you…if I’m there
its good but please fix the tutorial u cant mine wood and also be able tomake private servers thats all but i recommend making weekly updates
When I played there was so much to do I’m a beta tester so everyone please know that it’s in beta
The game itself is really fun it's just that the tutorial doesn't work but I know the game released a week or two ago

it is a good game and all but I'm stuck on tetoreel cant break stone 
😕
